instructions: Always re-read files after user makes manual edits - user restructures extensively offline
Assess sample populated directories against documentation standards before committing to structure
Frame documentation standards as proportional - smaller items need less context, but must still be useful
Feature workspaces are unprescribed - suggest commonly useful contents but don't mandate structure
Vision topics are scoped to when conceptualized, not to their feature - vision summary synthesizes all
SEO and similar cross-cutting concerns are features_and_functionality entries with generalized system outputs
Draft survival standards for documentation phase to prevent raw artifacts from becoming authoritative
